title: TrinityWeapons
description: Immerse yourself in an epic journey through time with TrinityWeapons, offering an extensive selection of meticulously crafted weaponry inspired by medieval, realistic, and modern eras.
body:
![Overview of TrinityWeapon's Weapons](https://oribia.dev/Img/Other/Overview.png "Overview") --- Immerse yourself in an epic journey through time with TrinityWeapons, offering an extensive selection of meticulously crafted weaponry inspired by medieval, realistic, and modern eras.
**Update Log v1.7.0 (11/29/2022):**    - Ported to 1.17 + 1.18 + 1.19 (Remade for 1.19)    - Nerfed Battle Axe 
**All Crafting Recipes are in the gallery tab!**
**Weapons:** - Spear - War Axe - War Hammer - Knife - Halberd - Katana - Knife - Halberd - Dagger - Lance - Guisarme - Lucerne - Quarter Staff    - Each of the above weapons has a complete set of Wood, Gold, Stone, Iron, Gold, and Netherite.
   **FAQ:**  - Can I record or stream while using this mod? Of course! Just make sure you list the download link with the proper credit!
 - Can I include this mod in a mod pack? Sure, just makes sure to credit me!
 - Where can I send bug reports? you can send bug reports or any suggestions to my GitHub Issue Tracker!
 - Can I rehost this mod? I'm sorry but no. This mod should be hosted only on my GitHub, CurseForge, or Modrinth.  
  **Credits:** Oribia - Creator/Author Devilb666 - Artist

**Please only download the mod from one of the following websites:** - CurseForge - Modrinth - GitHub If you are downloading it from another website, I suggest not to as they may contain viruses and can break or damage your game and or computer.
